evidence.q1: Notwithstanding Section 3 (Section 8 cross-reference resolves to existing Section 3; sections numbered 1 through 15 sequentially).
evidence.q2: Section 2 defines 'Digital Assets'; Section 1 uses 'supported Digital Assets' consistently.
evidence.q3: within 24 hours after receipt and in any event no later than 2 business days after receipt (Section 8).
evidence.q4: Custodian will not sell, lend, pledge, rehypothecate, transfer, encumber, invest, stake, or otherwise use Customer Assets (Section 3) – modern, no archaic diction.
evidence.q5: Custodian will maintain at least 97% of Customer Assets in cold-storage wallets except for assets needed to process pending Authorized Instructions. (Section 6, grammatically sound).
evidence.q6: Consistent modern register: 'Custodian will not sell, lend, pledge...' (Section 3) and 'Except for the carve-outs in this Section 13, each party's aggregate liability...' (Section 13).
